# Task: Fix orchestrate_task ROLE_TIER model fallback not applied (#57)

> Task ID: FORGE-S11-T03

## Description

When ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_PRIMARY/SECONDARY/FAST_MODEL env vars are unset, orchestrator neither falls back to ROLE_TIER defaults nor displays resolved model in phase announcements. Fix model resolution and announcement in meta-orchestrate.md.
